THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAHUD, CHUCK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUGUSTINE, THERESA BERDEJAS, ROBERTO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 JONES ST., #707, S.F., CA. $1,829.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,829.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-2004, LEASE FORFEITED, $1,829.00 SHALL BE PAID ON OR BEFORE 9:00 A.M. MAY 31, 2004. SHOULD DEFT MOVES BY MAY 31, 2004 JUDGMENT DEEMED SATISFIED IN FULL AND DEFTS ENTITLED TO $300.00 MOVEOUT EXPENSE. SEE JUDGMENT FOR CONDITIONS IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
